reason: QA test for browser-use feature: agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to example.com, extracted page title, and returned verification that the page title is "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with title "Gamut"
Found "QA-20260714-205550-84lq" agent in sidebar — Agent visible in left sidebar under "Your Agents"
Clicked on the agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded, chat interface displayed with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message visible in input field
Sent the message by clicking Send button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed in 13 seconds
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response states "The page title is "Example Domain"." and confirms "The page at https://example.com displays the heading "Example Domain"" — TEST PASSED
